facebook.caption:
POV: you stumble into Phố đi bộ - chợ đêm Phú Quốc after dark and suddenly your whole evening changes.

Street food, live performances, souvenir stalls, and a crowd that actually knows how to have fun. This is Phu Quoc at night, no resort wristband required.

Grand World location means easy access. Go hungry. Go late. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walked in with no plan. Stayed for two hours. Phố đi bộ - chợ đêm Phú Quốc hits different after 8pm. Street food in one hand, phone in the other. This is your Phu Quoc night sorted.
